## Type of change
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, config
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — no feature change, no bug fix

## Done checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] No secrets or .env values committed
- [ ] DEVLOG.md updated
